data.content: Planning complete. Relevant scope is the interaction picker dropdown inside the history conversation log, not the separate debug session selector. Use `src/components/interaction-picker.tsx` to enrich item metadata and centralize the new label logic, then render date + time in `src/components/interaction-picker-ui.tsx` while keeping selection/sorting behavior unchanged. Add targeted coverage for the pulldown text so conversation number remains visible and duplicate Prompt/Take numbering is collapsed to one ordinal when equivalent.
